sub_task: Review tests/smoke-test.sh for test coverage gaps

findings.overall_assessment: tests/smoke-test.sh provides basic happy-path coverage for single-agent and metaswarm scaffolding but lacks comprehensive testing of core features, error handling, concurrency, and agent behaviors

currently_tested: Single-agent launch with custom agent cmd
critical_gaps: Atomic file operations and race conditions
Agent failure and error handling scenarios

untested_core_features: CLI validations (run-id format, count limits, git repo) (bin/stampede.sh:472-500)
Merger agent integration and Shadow Score (bin/stampede-merger.agent.md:18-55)
untested_edge_cases: Multiple agents with multi-task queue race conditions
Empty queue / missing run directory handling
missing_validations: Exit code assertions for invalid args
Result JSON required fields (task_id, status, summary, files_changed, branch)

tested_features: Premium model policy pool and banned models

untested_behaviors: Actual commander agent workflow execution (claim, branch, launch children, collect, write bundle)
Task claiming atomicity (mv to claimed/, update, cleanup)
Full swarm-state.json schema validation (launch_proof counts, telemetry, heartbeats)
Launch-proof success criteria (50 squad leads, 250 workers launched vs targets)
child-agents.jsonl complete lifecycle (launch_requested, launch_started, completed with metadata)
Result bundle atomic writes (bundle.json and results/{task_id}.json)
Actual SS-250 deployment execution (not just config)
Depth Guard and leaf worker prompt enforcement
Premium model enforcement in child launches
shallow_testing: swarm-state.json only checks file existence and a few fields, not full required shape
child-agents.jsonl only checks file exists and commander_registered, not full event stream
Commanders directory structure checked but not final artifacts or result mirroring

tested_features: Simple task claiming via rename (single-agent only)
critical_missing_tests: Atomic result writing (.tmp- prefix + os.rename pattern)
Race condition on task claiming with multiple agents
os.rename failure handling (ENOENT on race loss)
collaboration_bus_gaps.critical_issue: Smoke test stub agent writes results directly instead of using production .tmp- + rename atomic pattern

all_untested_scenarios: Monitor parsing errors for state/fleet/claimed/result files
tmux session failures (missing tmux, duplicate session, split failures)
Model unavailable / content exclusion preflight failures
error_handling_gaps.note: tests/smoke-test.sh is happy-path only with success stub and 'true' agent

high_priority: Add concurrency tests with ≥2 agents competing for tasks to validate atomic operations
Test actual commander agent execution, not just scaffolding
Add error handling test suite covering agent failures, stuck detection, invalid input
Test atomic result writing pattern (.tmp- + rename)
Add collaboration bus integration tests (protocol.json, IPC lifecycle)
Test monitor behaviors (stuck detection, orphan recovery, stats)
Test preflight checks and auth failures
medium_priority: Test CLI validations and error paths (count limits, invalid args)
Test model rotation and per-worker model selection
Test merge integration and Shadow Score
low_priority: Add more comprehensive JSON schema validation

test_coverage_metrics.note: Current testing is primarily happy-path scaffolding validation

worker_outputs.wkr-009-001: Identified 5 major categories of untested features: preflight checks, teardown, CLI validations, monitor integration, and agent system behaviors. Found 7 critical edge cases and 4 missing validation checks.
worker_outputs.wkr-009-002: Metaswarm basic scaffolding is tested (9 scenarios covered) but 6 critical scenarios missing: max commanders limit, --no-gates override, collaboration bus, commander failures, blocked state, and bundle output.
worker_outputs.wkr-009-003: Commander agent actual execution is completely untested. Smoke test bypasses with stub agent. Launch-proof validation, child-agents.jsonl lifecycle, and result bundles are missing or shallow.
worker_outputs.wkr-009-004: Zero concurrency tests exist. Critical gaps in atomic operations testing, race condition validation, and .tmp- pattern. Smoke test stub doesn't follow production atomic write pattern.
worker_outputs.wkr-009-005: Almost all error and failure scenarios are untested. No agent failure tests, stuck detection tests, invalid input tests, cleanup validation, or tmux failure tests. Smoke test is happy-path only.

next_steps: Prioritize adding concurrency tests with race conditions
Add real commander agent execution tests
Validate atomic operations and IPC patterns
